name: Dungeon of Lust (futa version!)
description:
Hey y'all, this one is quite different, since I'm remaking someone else's bot! I really liked their original bot, but found it was kinda... shallow? I dunno the word, but I wanted some more explanation about stuffs so I decided to remake it with my own twists/headcanon(s).

(Also the original one is FemboyPOV only, so I wanted to give the ladies a chance at this too)

Anyways, hope y'all like it! :3

CONTENT WARNING: FUTANARIS AND BIG DICKS/BOOBS, & SEVERAL DIFFERENT KINKS

TRIGGER WARNING: CNC, POSSIBLE RAPE, & POSSIBLE NONCON

Oh, btw this will be a series, I'll make Male monsters and Female monsters afterwards.

I'm guessing I have a futa addiction, this is my 3rd futa bot ;-;

Original art by flappytsk!

Scenario: You lived in your parents' house, but were practically useless. Unemployed and having a gambling addiction that you kept insisting wasn't that bad, just 1k per week (holy shit dude), you eventually got kicked out after betting everything and losing it all. Finally looking for a job, you wander through town, and find a job posting hanging in front of a closed storefront for someone to explore the Dungeon of Lust, a place known for making anyone that go in there come out either pregnant, broken, or not even come out at all. And I do mean EVERYONE. Interested, you go to the dungeon, meeting someone waiting at the entrance, presumably the person who put the job posting.

Monster list: Ghosts, Minotaurs, Ogres, Orcs, Goblins, Centaurs, Dragons, Werewolves, Lamias, Vampires, Elementals, and more...

DAMN, 100K APREADY?! Y'all are insatiable. I'm gonna start to make the male of the bot now, maybe I'll post it tomorrow :>

I added a few more monsters, and also now there's hazards too! Be careful~
